## Inventory

### Blocker 1 — try! ModelContainer crash

| # | File | Change | Status |
|---|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/TradeguruelectricalApp.swift:10` | Replace `try! ModelContainer(for:)` with do-catch. On failure: log error, show a fallback error screen or use fatalError with descriptive message (SwiftData failure is unrecoverable but should at least say why). | todo |

### Blocker 2 — Accessibility labels on all interactive elements

Every Button, interactive element, and icon-only control needs `.accessibilityLabel()`. Files listed with count of elements needing labels:

| # | File | Elements Needing Labels | Status |
|---|------|------------------------|--------|
| 1 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/ChatView.swift` | 3: hamburger button ("Menu"), gear button ("Settings"), new chat button ("New conversation") | todo |
| 2 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/ChatInputBar.swift` | 5: plus/menu button ("Attach"), send button ("Send message"), mic button ("Record voice"), stop button ("Stop recording"), camera close | todo |
| 3 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/MessageBubble.swift` | 7: star 1-5 ("Rate N stars"), flag button ("Report response"), speak button ("Read aloud") | todo |
| 4 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/SidebarView.swift` | 4: close button ("Close menu"), conversation rows ("Open {title}"), new chat button ("New conversation"), search clear ("Clear search") | todo |
| 5 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/ModeSelector.swift` | 3: mode pill buttons ("Select {mode.name} mode") | todo |
| 6 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/ModeInfoCard.swift` | 1: close button ("Dismiss mode info") | todo |
| 7 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/Onboarding/OnboardingView.swift` | 1: Skip button ("Skip onboarding") | todo |
| 8 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/Onboarding/OnboardingFinalPageView.swift` | 2: Get Started button, Sign In button | todo |
| 9 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/Legal/SafetyDisclaimerView.swift` | 1: Accept button ("Accept safety disclaimer") | todo |
| 10 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/Settings/SettingsView.swift` | 3: Sign In button, Sign Out button, Clear Conversations button | todo |
| 11 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/Settings/SignInView.swift` | 3: Google, Apple, Email sign-in buttons | todo |
| 12 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/CameraView.swift` | 3: capture button ("Take photo"), flash toggle ("Toggle flash"), close button ("Close camera") | todo |
| 13 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/Blocks/CodeBlockView.swift` | 1: copy button ("Copy code") | todo |
| 14 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/PipelineStatusView.swift` | 0 (display only) but add `.accessibilityElement(children: .combine)` and `.accessibilityLabel("Searching knowledge base")` etc. | todo |
| 15 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/Onboarding/OnboardingPageView.swift` | 1: page content needs `.accessibilityElement(children: .combine)` with combined label | todo |
| 16 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/Settings/TierBadgeView.swift` | 1: badge needs `.accessibilityLabel("{tier} plan")` | todo |

**Total interactive elements: ~40**

### Warning 3 — Force unwraps on URLs

| # | File | Lines | Change | Status |
|---|------|-------|--------|--------|
| 1 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/APIConfig.swift` | ~16 | `URL(string:)!` → `guard let url = URL(string:) else { ... }` or use `URL(string:)!` with a comment that it's a static known-good URL (acceptable pattern for compile-time constants) | todo |
| 2 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/AuthManager.swift` | ~31, ~162, ~180 | Same — replace `URL(string:)!` and `URLComponents(string:)!` with guard-let | todo |
| 3 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Services/TradeGuruAPI.swift` | ~142, ~144, ~172, ~174 | `.data(using: .utf8)!` — these are safe (UTF-8 encoding never fails for String) but replace with `?? Data()` for cleanliness | todo |

### Warning 4 — Disclaimer scroll detection

| # | File | Change | Status |
|---|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | `ios/Tradeguruelectrical/Views/Legal/SafetyDisclaimerView.swift` | Current: `.onAppear` on hidden `Color.clear` at bottom. Risk: may trigger before user actually sees the bottom on fast devices. Fix: use `ScrollViewReader` with `GeometryReader` to detect when bottom element is visible in viewport, or use `onAppear` with a slight delay to prevent premature triggering. | todo |

## Build Order

### Phase 1 — Blocker 1 (1 file, immediate)
| # | Item | Why first |
|---|------|-----------|
| 1 | TradeguruelectricalApp try! fix | Prevents crash at launch — highest severity |

### Phase 2 — Warning 3 (3 files, quick)
| # | Item | Why now |
|---|------|---------|
| 2 | APIConfig force unwraps | Quick cleanup, no UI changes |
| 3 | AuthManager force unwraps | Same |
| 4 | TradeGuruAPI force unwraps | Same |

### Phase 3 — Blocker 2 (16 files, bulk)
| # | Item | Why now |
|---|------|---------|
| 5-20 | Accessibility labels on 16 view files | Bulk operation, parallelisable — split views across 2-3 agents |

### Phase 4 — Warning 4 (1 file)
| # | Item | Why last |
|---|------|---------|
| 21 | Disclaimer scroll fix | Low priority, current approach works in most cases |
